meta.title: Irwin Stelzer on the Economic Implications of the Situation in Egypt
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of Economic Policy Studies Irwin Stelzer discusses the economic implications the situation in Egypt will have for the Middle East and around the globe.
